landing_description: Sentinel Health helps care organizations apply consistent safeguards, monitor sensitive data exposure, and preserve auditable records around AI use.
landing_highlights: Apply AI safety rules before care workflow requests reach a model.
Monitor sensitive data exposure, manipulation attempts, and policy violations.
Maintain exportable oversight records across cases, departments, and systems.
trial_description: Send your details and we will follow up to set up a healthcare-focused demo environment.
